title: Decaisnella cumingiana
taxonomy: Decaisnella cumingiana is classified within the family Ericaceae and is a species of flowering plant. It is native to the Philippines and is a member of the genus Decaisnella. The plant is closely related to other species within the Ericaceae family, which includes heath and heather plants. The exact classification of Decaisnella cumingiana may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a member of the Ericales order. Further research may be necessary to confirm the plant's classification.
